mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_BOM_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblBomMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chldMtrlCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_BOM_EXCL_SAVE ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmtrlCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
